summary: DHH announces he will be speaking at three California events in April 2008: an AppFolio event, Paul Graham's Startup School, and an SD Forum Ruby conference meetup. The post is a brief travel notice inviting readers to say hello if they attend any of the events.
key_points: DHH was invited to speak at Paul Graham's Startup School, signaling his prominence in the startup world
The post highlights DHH's engagement with both the Ruby community and the broader startup ecosystem
Brief logistics post with no substantive argument or opinion
money_quotes: If you're at any of these events, do stop by and say hi.
key_insight: A brief travel announcement showing DHH's dual standing in both the Ruby developer community and the Silicon Valley startup scene circa 2008.
